zh.lifeSummary: 當Dorothy Barsham於1674年2月23日出生在美國新罕布夏州洛金哈姆波斯姆斯時，她的父親John Barsham38歲，母親Mehitable Dalton34歲。她於大約1701年與James Allen在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆波斯姆斯結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1761年在美國緬因州約克約克享年87歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dorothy Barsham于1674年2月23日出生在美国新罕布什尔州洛金哈姆波斯姆斯时，她的父亲John Barsham38岁，母亲Mehitable Dalton34岁。她于大约1701年与James Allen在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆波斯姆斯结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1761年在美国缅因州約克約克享年87岁。

nameMeanings.name: Barsham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from North, East, or West Barsham (Norfolk), or from Barsham (Suffolk).

variants.name: Basson
meanings: French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Basso, based on the element bad (from badhuo) ‘battle’.
German: of French (Huguenot) origin (see 2 above). This surname is very rare in Germany. Compare   Posson  .

variants.name: Basham
meanings: English (Norfolk, Suffolk, and Essex): variant of Barsham, a habitational name from any of the places in Norfolk and Suffolk called Barsham, from the genitive case of the Old English byname Bār ‘wild boar’ + Old English hām ‘homestead’.

nameMeanings.name: Dorothy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothee
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothie
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

en.lifeSummary: When Dorothy Barsham was born on 23 February 1674, in Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, United States, her father, John Barsham, was 38 and her mother, Mehitable Dalton, was 34. She married James Allen about 1701, in Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1761, in York, York, Maine, United States, at the age of 87.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dorothy Barsham est née le 23 février 1674, à Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, États-Unis, son père, John Barsham, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Mehitable Dalton, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé James Allen environ 1701, à Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1761, à York, York, Maine, États-Unis, à l’âge de 87 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dorothy Barsham am 23. Februar 1674 in Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Barsham 38 und ihre Mutter Mehitable Dalton 34. Sie hat um 1701 in Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America James Allen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1761 im Alter von 87 Jahren in York, York, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dorothy Barsham è nata il il 23 febbraio 1674 nel Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, John Barsham, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Mehitable Dalton, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato James Allen circa 1701, nel Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1761, nel York, York, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 87 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Dorothy Barshamが1674年2月23日にアメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州ロクインガムポルトスモウスで生まれた時，父John Barshamは38歳，母Mehitable Daltonは34歳であった。約1701年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアロクインガムポルトスモウスでJames Allenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1761年にアメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークヨークで87歳で死去した。

ko.Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 포츠모우스

ko.Kittery, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 키터이

ko.Berwick, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 버윅
ko.lifeSummary: Dorothy Barsham(이)가 1674년 2월 23일 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 록잉함 포츠모우스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Barsham(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mehitable Dalton(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 대략 1701년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 포츠모우스에서 James Allen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1761년 미국 메인 주 요르크 요르크에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dorothy Barsham nasceu em 23 de fevereiro de 1674, em Portsmouth, Rockingham, Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, John Barsham, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Mehitable Dalton, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com James Allen aproximadamente 1701, em Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1761, em York, York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América, com 87 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dorothy Barsham родилась 23 февраля 1674 г. в местности порцмоут, роккингхам, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени John Barsham было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Mehitable Dalton, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Allen около 1701 г. в местности порцмоут, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1761 г. в местности ерк, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 87 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dorothy Barsham nació el 23 de febrero de 1674, en Portsmouth, Rockingham, Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos, su papá, John Barsham, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Mehitable Dalton, tenía 34 años. Se casó con James Allen aproximadamente 1701, en Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1761, en York, York, Maine, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 87 años.
